## Source: amazon-inspector (ea184ad5469def11090bb56f964419126c2f809ebce868fae9f5f88e0a641ccf)
The package apollo-vertex was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b0c3743a4754849ea1ab98528606e61e07b8ad85dd52ebde573c5beddc276d37)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'apollo-vertex' @ 1.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
